overall.description: Aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection at night, featuring a massive holographic fish swimming above a multi-level highway interchange. The scene is illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements and cycling traffic lights, with vehicles moving along the elevated roads. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showcasing a high-density urban environment with advanced holographic technology.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban highway interchange with holographic advertisement

events.description: traffic lights on the circular plaza change from red to green
holographic fish display changes color from blue-white to orange-red
traffic lights cycle to purple and yellow hues

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation of the intersection, focusing on the holographic display and traffic flow below

entered.detail: massive translucent holographic projection of a betta fish swimming in the sky above the intersection
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon signage on the left side of the frame

central circular pedestrian plaza with trees and illuminated pathways surrounded by roads
curved multi-lane elevated roadway with moving traffic on the left side of the interchange
curved multi-lane elevated roadway with moving traffic on the right side of the interchange
rows of traffic signals lining the circular plaza that cycle through red, green, and purple illumination

segments.scene_description: A stationary aerial view captures a futuristic cyberpunk intersection at night, dominated by a massive holographic fish swimming overhead. The scene features elevated highway ramps with moderate traffic flowing around a central circular plaza, flanked by glass office towers covered in neon advertisements. The holographic display transitions from blue to orange hues while traffic lights cycle through colors, illuminating the multi-level roadways below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary aerial perspective of a futuristic cyberpunk intersection that pulses with shifting holographic light and rhythmic traffic patterns. It begins with a wide view of a multi-level highway interchange where a massive holographic fish swims overhead, casting a dominant glow over the central circular plaza. As the scene unfolds, the holographic display transitions from cool blue to vibrant orange hues, altering the color palette of the surrounding glass office towers and their neon advertisements. The lighting further evolves as traffic lights cycle through their colors, continuously illuminating the flow of vehicles along the elevated ramps below.
